title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL. It includes best practices for efficient data storage and querying. The lecture is part of Harvard University's CS50 educational program available through multiple platforms including edX.
